name: Google Ads
description: Query and analyze Google Ads campaign data, budgets, performance metrics, and account information using natural language. Read-only access via the official Google Ads MCP server.
user_auth_instructions:
Click 'Connect' to link your Google account.
You'll be prompted to sign in and grant access to your Google Ads accounts.
setup_notes:
Uses Google's official Google Ads MCP server (google-ads-mcp).

Admin setup:
1. Go to https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials
2. Create an OAuth 2.0 Client ID (type: Web application)
3. Add authorized redirect URI:
   {your_app_url}/api/v1/mcp-servers/{server_id}/oauth/callback
4. Enable the Google Ads API
5. Obtain a Google Ads API Developer Token from
   https://ads.google.com/aw/apicenter
6. Enter Client ID, Client Secret, and Developer Token

Provides read-only access. Cannot modify campaigns, bids, or budgets.
